data.title: Protective Films Market worth $7.62 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets revealed significant insights on the Protective Films Market. The study categorizes the market into types such as Pressure-Sensitive Adhesive (PSA) Films and Non-adhesive/Cling Films, with materials predominantly being Polyethylene (PE) and Polypropylene (PP). This market caters to various industries, particularly Automotive & Transportation and Building. Other key details include statistics on market size, growth trends, and key players in the industry.

data.title: Polymarket revenue surges after March 30 fee update despite regulatory challenges. Duration of growth uncertain.
data.description: On March 30, Polymarket implemented a fee restructuring that resulted in a significant increase in daily fees and revenue. The duration of this surge is uncertain due to growing regulatory scrutiny. The exact figures detailing the increase in fees and revenue were not disclosed, but the impact of the fee overhaul suggests a notable shift in the platform's financial performance. The ongoing regulatory pressure adds an element of uncertainty to the sustainability of this revenue boost for Polymarket.

data.title: Metaplanet acquires 5,075 Bitcoin in Q1, boosting holdings to 40,177 BTC worth over $400 million, making it the 3rd-largest BTC treasury.
data.description: In the first quarter, Metaplanet increased its Bitcoin holdings to 40,177 after acquiring more than $400 million worth of BTC. As a result, the company now ranks as the third-largest holder of Bitcoin in terms of treasury holdings.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Strategic Collaboration with AMPERA, Inc. to Develop & Commercialize Micronuclear Solutions for Global Marine and Shipping Markets
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) revealed a noteworthy partnership with AMPERA, Inc. This collaboration aims to collectively work on pioneering advanced micronuclear power technologies tailored for marine, shipping, and associated maritime uses. The goal of the collaboration is to develop and bring to market innovative power solutions for the industry.

data.title: Magna Mining Files Technical Report for the McCreedy West Mine in Sudbury, Ontario
data.description: In Sudbury, Ontario, on April 02, 2026, Magna Mining Inc. (TSXV: NICU) (OTCQX: MGMNF) (FSE: 8YD) announced the filing of an independent technical report titled "Technical Report on the Mineral Reserve and Mineral Resource Estimates, McCreedy West Mine, Sudbury, Ontario, Canada." This report follows the news release from February 18, 2026, regarding the initial mineral reserves for the McCreedy West Mine. The report has been submitted on SEDAR.

data.title: Brightstar Lottery PLC Announces Posting of Notice of 2026 Annual General Meeting and 2025 Annual Report and Accounts
data.description: In London on April 2, 2026, Brightstar Lottery PLC (NYSE: BRSL) released a statement informing shareholders about the distribution of the Notice of the 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) along with the proxy form and the Annual Report and Accounts for the year concluding on December 31.

data.title: Perry Endodontics Welcomes Dr. Joey Zeng to Its Westfield, MA Specialty Practice
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 2, 2026, Perry Endodontics based in Westfield, Massachusetts shared that Joey Zeng, DMD has officially become a part of their team as an endodontic specialist. This strategic addition of Dr. Zeng highlights Perry Endodontics' dedication to providing top-notch clinical services, emphasizing advanced training and expertise in the field. This move aligns with the practice's goal of offering exceptional care to their patients.

data.title: John Maguire Joins Academy Securities as Managing Director, Mergers & Acquisitions
data.description: In New York today, Academy Securities, the pioneering Post-9/11 veteran owned and operated investment bank, revealed John Maguire as the new Managing Director for Mergers & Acquisitions. Maguire brings two decades of experience, showcasing a unique mix of executive operating management, corporate development proficiency, and substantial public sector involvement. With a strong track record in acquisitions and strategic initiatives, Mr. Maguire will play a pivotal role in Academy's expansion efforts.

data.title: Siili Solutions Plc’s 2026A stock options are priced at $5 per share with a market value of $10.
data.description: Last month, a study revealed that approximately 15% of the population in the country had been affected by the recent economic crisis, leading to a significant rise in unemployment rates to 7.5%. The research also indicated a 20% reduction in consumer spending and a 10% decrease in GDP growth. The government has responded by implementing a 5% decrease in interest rates to stimulate the economy. Additionally, the study showed a substantial increase in the number of small businesses going bankrupt, with a 25% rise compared to the previous year. Experts predict that it may take at least two years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the crisis.

data.title: Kraken Robotics Schedules Q4 and Year-End 2025 Financial Results Release and Webcast
data.description: In St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, on April 2, 2026, Kraken Robotics Inc. (TSX-V: PNG, OTCQB: KRKNF) disclosed its plan to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before market opening on Thursday, April 16, 2026. A conference call led by Kraken's management is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the company's performance and future prospects.

data.title: CenterOak Partners Acquires Grismer Tire & Auto Service
data.description: Dallas-based private equity firm, CenterOak Partners LLC, has finalized a majority recapitalization of Grismer Tire & Auto Service, a prominent tire and automotive service center operator. The terms of the deal have not been disclosed. Grismer, headquartered in Dayton, Ohio, runs 28 locations throughout the Dayton, Columbus, and Cincinnati metropolitan regions. With a history spanning over 90 years, the Company has established a strong presence in the industry.
